summary: Completed testing for 3DKPRINT e-commerce. Verified cart persistence fix (lazy useState initialization), backend email API endpoints, and homepage navigation. All core features working correctly.

minor.issue: Resend API in test mode - can only send to verified domain owner email
minor.note: This is expected Resend behavior - need domain verification for production

issues: No fallback sample data showing - API errors cause empty state instead of fallback data

passed_tests: POST /api/send-orcamento-email accepts valid payload and calls Resend API
Cart persistence via localStorage - items persist after page navigation
Cart persistence on direct /checkout URL access - items properly loaded from localStorage
CartContext uses lazy initialization with useState(() => JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('3dkprint_cart')))
All homepage navigation links work: Marcas, Produtos, Serviços, Orçamento, Portfólio, Comunidade, Conhecimento, Consultor 3D, Contato
Novo Orçamento Manual form opens correctly
critical_code_review_comments: CartContext lazy initialization fix is correctly implemented - cart state is properly hydrated from localStorage on initial render
Email sending uses real Resend API (not mocked) - will work in production with verified domain
Admin orcamentos fetchOrcamentos catch block should show fallback data but orcamentosAPI.getAll() might be returning empty array instead of throwing
seed_data_creation: None - used localStorage manipulation to test cart persistence
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cart persistence issue from iteration_3 has been FIXED. CartContext now uses lazy initialization: useState(() => JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('3dkprint_cart'))). Email API uses real Resend integration. All products on /produtos page are currently marked as 'Esgotado' (out of stock). Admin panel uses sessionStorage for JWT tokens with localStorage fallback.

cart_persistence_issue.root_cause: Previous CartContext used useState([]) then useEffect to load from localStorage, causing empty cart state on direct URL access before useEffect ran
cart_persistence_issue.fix_applied: Changed to lazy initialization: useState(() => { const saved = localStorage.getItem('3dkprint_cart'); return saved ? JSON.parse(saved) : [] })
cart_persistence_issue.verification: Tested by setting cart item in localStorage, then navigating directly to /checkout - item displayed correctly
